examples: Indigestion is a catchall term for any kind of stomach distress.
Garlic is also good for the treatment of bronchitis, colds, coughs, sore throat, fever and indigestion.
The poor fellow, with his mind on the Field of Wonders, was suffering from a gold-piece indigestion.
But since Federated went public--for the second time--in May 1998, Donahue has been suffering stock market indigestion.
Its acquisition of American Stores, which more than doubled its store count to 2, 600, resulted in financial indigestion.
